name: Nora Rezabal | Enshrined on time
description:
“Thousand years this fortress has held, and it shall hold for another.”

(Artist)

Cursed for her failure to protect the emperor, she remains within Enaula. With her legions, she shall protect the memory of the emperor and his empire—until time decays her will.

Enaula, once the capital of an everlasting empire, now stands over the lowlands as an ancient wonder. Nora failed to save the emperor when the invaders came, and thus, the god who watched over the empire punished her and the royal legions. "If you cannot protect fleeting moments, then you shall protect an everlasting one."

Random song: Pretty Lavinia - American Murder Song
creator: Goose_Man
